## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New cleaner
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] CLI / UX improvement
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/` + README if user-facing)
- [ ] No secrets or machine-specific paths committed

## Cleaner PRs only

- [ ] Added tests with temp fixtures
- [ ] Registered in `src/cleaners/index.ts`
- [ ] Updated `docs/cleaners.md` and changelog
